# Silverthread Labs — Complete Reference

> AI automation agency building agentic AI systems, voice agents, and workflow automation for regulated industries. Self-hosted, production-grade.

Website: https://www.silverthreadlabs.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/silverthreadlabs
GitHub: https://github.com/silverthreadlabs/
Medium: https://medium.com/@silverthreadlabs

---

## Company Overview

Silverthread Labs is an AI automation agency founded in 2019. We build production-grade, self-hosted AI systems that run business operations 24/7. Our focus is regulated industries — healthcare, legal, finance, real estate — where data privacy, compliance, and reliability are non-negotiable.

Every engagement starts with a structured Automation Audit: we map operations, identify the highest-ROI automation targets, and deliver a prioritized roadmap before any project budget is committed.

---

## Services (20+)

### Agentic AI Systems Development
Autonomous agents that handle multi-step business workflows — lead enrichment, data routing, document processing, multi-agent orchestration with memory, tool use, and human-in-the-loop escalation.

### Voice AI Agents
Phone-based AI for appointment booking, intake, customer support, and outbound calls. Built on Vapi, Retell, or custom pipelines with real-time voice processing.

### Workflow Automation
End-to-end process automation connecting business tools. Single-process builds through multi-system workflows across CRMs, EHRs, payment systems, and communication platforms.

### Self-Hosted AI Infrastructure
Deploy AI on your servers, not third-party clouds. HIPAA/GDPR/FINRA-compliant builds with ongoing ops and monitoring.

### Custom AI Solutions (RAG, Knowledge Bases, Document Processing)
RAG systems, fine-tuned models, and AI built on your data. Single-domain knowledge bases through multi-source RAG pipelines.

### MCP Server Development
Custom Model Context Protocol servers — from SMB single-source connectors to enterprise multi-source deployments with auth and compliance layers.

### OpenClaw Deployment
Setup, hardening, and deployment of OpenClaw — from personal installs to business multi-user deployments.

### Systems Integration
Connect existing business tools — HubSpot, Salesforce, QuickBooks, EHRs, Stripe, Calendly, and 50+ platforms. Point-to-point through multi-system integrations.

### Claude Code Consulting & AI Developer Tooling
Expert consulting on Claude Code, AI-assisted development workflows, and custom developer tooling.

### Browser Extension Development
Chrome, Firefox, and Edge extensions — from simple utilities to complex applications with 100,000+ users.

### Mobile App Development
iOS, Android, and cross-platform applications using React Native and native development.

### Web & SaaS Development
Full-stack web applications and SaaS platforms.

### UX/UI Design Services
Interface design for web, mobile, and desktop applications.

### Custom Desktop App Development
Electron and Tauri desktop applications.

### Web Scraping & Data Pipeline Services
Automated data collection and processing pipelines.

### KYC/AML System Integration
Know Your Customer and Anti-Money Laundering compliance system integration.

### Payment Systems Integration
Stripe, payment processors, and financial system integration.

### Blockchain Development Services
Smart contracts, DeFi, and blockchain application development.

### Business Automation Audit
Structured assessment of operations to identify highest-ROI automation targets. Produces a written roadmap.

### Cowork Plugin & Desktop Agent Development
Custom desktop agents and productivity plugins.

---

## Industries Served

### Healthcare & Medical Practices
AI for patient intake, appointment scheduling, EHR integration, clinical documentation, and HIPAA-compliant automation.

### Dental Practices
Voice AI for appointment booking, patient follow-up, insurance verification, and practice management automation.

### Legal / Law Firms
AI for client intake, document review, case management automation, and private AI that keeps data on-premise.

### Real Estate
AI for lead qualification, property matching, transaction coordination, and CRM automation for agents and brokerages.

### Financial Services & Accounting
AI for data entry automation, compliance workflows, client communication, and financial document processing.

### Insurance
AI for quote generation, claims processing, policy management, and customer service automation.

### Restaurants & Hospitality
Voice AI for reservations, order management, staff scheduling, and customer engagement.

### Salons, Spas & Beauty
Appointment booking, client follow-up, inventory management, and marketing automation.

### Veterinary Clinics
Patient scheduling, reminder systems, medical record management, and client communication.

### Home Services (HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Roofing)
Lead capture, dispatch automation, scheduling, invoicing, and customer follow-up.

### Automotive (Dealerships & Service Centers)
Lead management, service appointment scheduling, inventory tracking, and customer retention.

### E-commerce
Order processing, customer service automation, inventory management, and marketing automation.

### Recruiting & Staffing
Candidate screening, interview scheduling, ATS integration, and communication automation.

### Marketing Agencies
Client reporting, campaign automation, content workflows, and project management integration.

### Property Management
Tenant communication, maintenance request handling, lease management, and accounting automation.

### Business Development & Sales Teams
Lead enrichment, outreach automation, CRM workflows, and pipeline management.

---

## Products

### Bloggen
AI-powered developer publishing platform. Production-ready Next.js template with built-in SEO (JSON-LD, OG images, sitemaps, RSS), MDX content support, and AI-generated content integration.

### Ezly
AI communication assistant for freelancers. Helps draft professional messages, proposals, and client communications.

---

## Pricing

### Agentic AI Systems
- Single-agent automation: $5,000 - $15,000 (2-4 weeks)
- Custom multi-step agents: $25,000 - $100,000+ (8-16 weeks)
- Ongoing agent retainer: $1,500 - $8,000/mo

### Voice AI Agents
- Build fee: $2,500 - $10,000 (2-4 weeks)
- Operating cost per call: $0.25 - $0.50
- Optimization retainer: $500 - $2,500/mo

### Workflow Automation
- Single-process build: $3,000 - $8,000 (1-3 weeks)
- Multi-system workflow: $8,000 - $25,000+ (3-8 weeks)
- Management retainer: $500 - $3,000/mo

### Self-Hosted AI Infrastructure
- Deployment and hardening: $5,000 - $25,000 (2-6 weeks)
- HIPAA/GDPR/FINRA builds: $15,000 - $60,000+ (+2-4 weeks)
- Ongoing ops and monitoring: $1,000 - $5,000/mo

### Custom AI (RAG, Knowledge Bases)
- Single-domain knowledge base: $4,000 - $12,000 (2-4 weeks)
- Multi-source RAG pipeline: $12,000 - $30,000+ (4-8 weeks)
- Expansion retainer: $1,000 - $4,000/mo

### MCP Server Development
- SMB single-source connector: $25,000 - $50,000 (4-8 weeks)
- Production multi-source with auth: $60,000 - $120,000 (8-16 weeks)
- Enterprise with compliance layer: $100,000+ (12+ weeks)

### OpenClaw Deployment
- Personal install and hardening: $399 - $999 (1-2 weeks)
- Business multi-user deployment: $2,500 - $6,000+ (2-4 weeks)

### Systems Integration
- Point-to-point (2 systems): $1,500 - $5,000 (1-2 weeks)
- Multi-system (3-6 systems): $5,000 - $15,000 (2-6 weeks)
- Ongoing maintenance: $300 - $1,500/mo

### The Automation Audit
- Solo founder / small team: $500 (1 week)
- SMB multi-department: $1,000 - $2,500 (1-2 weeks)
- Enterprise pre-project: Custom (2-4 weeks)

### Engagement Models
1. **Project-Based** — defined scope, fixed deliverable, clear acceptance criteria. Best for first builds and MVPs.
2. **Retainer** — ongoing optimization, expansion, and ops support. $500-$8,000/month.
3. **Audit-First** — every engagement starts with a structured assessment. Produces a written roadmap you own.

---

## How We Work

1. **Automation Audit** — We map your operations, identify highest-ROI targets, and deliver a prioritized roadmap.
2. **Scope & Proposal** — Based on the audit, we define deliverables, timelines, and pricing.
3. **Build** — Iterative development with regular check-ins. You see working software early and often.
4. **Deploy** — Production deployment on your infrastructure or managed hosting.
5. **Support** — Ongoing monitoring, optimization, and expansion via retainer.

---

## Technology Stack

We build with production-proven tools:

**AI/ML:** OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, open-source LLMs, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, Ollama, vLLM
**Voice AI:** Vapi, Retell, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, AssemblyAI
**Automation:** n8n, Zapier, Make, custom pipelines
**Frontend:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Node.js, Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Supabase
**Infrastructure:** Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Vercel, self-hosted
**Integrations:** HubSpot, Salesforce, QuickBooks, Stripe, Calendly, EHR systems, and 50+ platforms

---

## Portfolio Highlights (17 Projects)

- **AI Toolbar** — Chrome extension scaled to 100,000+ users
- **Aiden Solutions** — AI technical support that learns product manuals
- **GlanceAI** — AI web summaries for 24,700+ users
- **Permuto** — Regulated fintech platform on Chia blockchain
- **OnlyAutomator** — AI CRM and automation for the creator economy
- **Niggle.ai** — AI study tool that turns documents into understanding
- **Viayze** — AI email marketing that learns every recipient
- **AudioTextify** — AI transcription and translation in 99 languages
- **designrift** — CSS token and Tailwind theme generator
- **FireClaw** — E-commerce for a Ukrainian comics publisher

Full portfolio: https://www.silverthreadlabs.com/projects

---

## FAQ

**How does every engagement start?**
Every project begins with an Automation Audit — a structured assessment where we map your operations, identify the highest-ROI automation targets, and deliver a prioritized roadmap. No commitment beyond the audit fee.

**Do you build on our infrastructure or yours?**
We specialize in self-hosted deployments. Your AI runs on your servers, your cloud, your data. We also support managed hosting for teams that prefer it.

**What industries do you work with?**
Healthcare, dental, legal, real estate, financial services, insurance, restaurants, salons, veterinary, home services, automotive, e-commerce, recruiting, marketing agencies, property management, and business development.

**How long does a typical project take?**
Simple automations: 1-4 weeks. Complex multi-agent systems: 8-16 weeks. Enterprise deployments: 12+ weeks. Every project includes a timeline estimate in the proposal.

**Do you handle compliance (HIPAA, GDPR, FINRA)?**
Yes. We build compliant systems from the ground up — not as an afterthought. Self-hosted infrastructure ensures data never leaves your control.

**What happens after launch?**
We offer retainer plans ($500-$8,000/month) for ongoing monitoring, optimization, and expansion. We don't build and disappear.
